scripts.build: npm run build -w @patchrelay/core && npm run build -w @patchrelay/server && npm run build -w @patchrelay/web && npm run build -w @patchrelay/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @patchrelay/core && npm run build -w @patchrelay/server && npm run typecheck -w @patchrelay/web && npm run typecheck -w @patchrelay/cli
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test
